ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "auth" INTEGER /* Authorization number associated with the account */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "customer_unit" INTEGER /* Customer unit reference (e.g., branch or department) */,
  "average_balance" REAL /* Average balance maintained over a period */,
  "outstanding_debt" REAL /* Outstanding debt associated with the account */,
  "customer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "customer_type" INTEGER /* Type of customer (e.g., Individual, Corporate) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, dormant, closed) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merchant involved in the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., groceries, utilities) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES accounts ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., City, Branch) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., ATM, Branch Office) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_accounts" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions for the account */,
  "average_transaction_amount" REAL /* Average transaction amount for the account */,
  "total_debt" REAL /* Total outstanding debt for the account */,
  "total_credit_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of credit transactions */,
  "total_debit_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of debit transactions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the statistics were last updated */,
  "max_transaction_amount" REAL /* Maximum transaction amount */,
  "min_transaction_amount" REAL /* Minimum transaction amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_statistics_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES accounts ("card_id")
)
